tokenPolicy: access/refresh tokens intentionally omitted from evidence

rows.name: Min 2 max 5 purchase
rows.description: Shopify Admin segment: number_of_orders BETWEEN 2 AND 5

rows.name: HYDRO1620 sayfasıyla ilgilenmiş satın almamış müşteriler
rows.query: storefront.product_viewed MATCHES (id = 10121656500500) OR storefront.product_viewed MATCHES (id = 9570517811476) AND products_purchased NOT MATCHES (id = 10121656500500) AND products_purchased NOT MATCHES (id = 9570517811476)

rows.name: rwr
Customers who have purchased UV DTF inks, or UV DTF Films
Customers who have purchased DTF inks, DTF films, or DTF powders
Customers who have purchased a heat press
rows.query:
number_of_orders >= 1
AND products_purchased MATCHES (
  id IN ( 9570517811476, 9840906764564, 9840895557908 )
)

rows.name: Customers who have purchased DTF or UV DTF Printer
rows.query:
number_of_orders >= 1
AND products_purchased MATCHES (
  id IN ( 9616199614740, 9570503786772, 9570505687316, 9570509848852 )
)

rows.name: Customers who have not placed an order in the last 2 months
Promo-eligible customers who haven't purchased yet
Promo-eligible customers (Discount Audience)
rows.query:
customer_tags NOT CONTAINS 'wholesale30'
AND customer_tags NOT CONTAINS 'partner'

rows.name: Customers who have purchased at least once

shopifySegmentRows.name: Customers who have purchased at least once
Promo-eligible customers who haven't purchased yet
Customers who have not placed an order in the last 2 months

Customers who have purchased DTF inks, DTF films, or DTF powders
